reviews.review_msg: literally the worst instructor at fic, treats adult students like literal children and will tell you to pay for photo copies of documents already available on moodle, bro will not let you get in on any in-class assignments if you're LITERALLY a minute late, would not recommend taking his class.

DON'T take his class. He gave bad instruction, after the midterm will be focused on a term paper and you will be doing it until you finish the course, but what you will do is keep repeating the same things, you will be answer the same question, but he required you to upload new version. And you won't learn any writing skills in this course!

Totally rude and disrespectful to student. Request you to join his office hour but he got late and he thinks that is the students responsibility and mark student as absent. No main point on his lesson and just following his PowerPoint to  read instead. Non-meaningful lecturer and the worst lecturer I ever met.
Pay attention to every little detail, he will not explain specifically on instructions.

This guy's lesson is the last thing you wanted to start your university life, he grade essays so harshly. His lessons are boring and not educational, if you consider to learn about university writing you should never choose this mf's class.

Get ready to cherish all the little time you have for other classes as you have to drop everything else to work on his homework, assignments, and go to office hours because they're announced 2 days before they're due/required. His instructions are specific but inconsistent. James means well and grades fairly, but all the working was torturous.
